Home - Jobs
Job Opportunities

Thank you for your interest in working with Goldline Curling! We are always on the look out for talented and motivated individuals who fit well with our team. You can find a list of specific positions that we are currently looking to fill below.

If you are interested in a position with us, please send an email to jobs@goldlinecurling.com.

Current Openings: Assistant Warehouse Manager
Location: 5600 Ambler Drive, Mississauga, ON
Position Type: On-Going Full-Time
Reports To: Warehouse Manager
Salary Range: $63,000 to $72,000 per year (Target: $67,500)
Starting salary within this range will be determined based on the successful candidate's depth of supervisory experience, technical proficiency, and industry certifications.
About the Role

Goldline is looking for a dynamic, hands-on Assistant Warehouse Manager to lead daily floor operations and team productivity at our Mississauga distribution facility. In this role, you will step onto the floor as a collaborative leader, directly supervising a core team of four full-time Warehouse Associates alongside a fluctuating seasonal workforce.
